milestone_objective.sentence: Rename stale NPU identifiers, fix jwt_minter import layering, and migrate misplaced tests to correct directories per TEST_GOVERNANCE.md taxonomy.
milestone_objective.internal_execution_order: (1) rename pass first, (2) import-layering fixes second, (3) file moves last. No step may interleave with another; each step is completed, `pytest --co -q` validates zero collection errors, and only then the next step begins.

provenance.parent_head_verified_at: 2026-04-23 (SDO git rev-parse HEAD at authoring time)
provenance.depends_on: EA-4 merged to main (`3563257` per Co-Lead completion comment)

comprehension_gate.directive: Before writing a single line of code, EA MUST post an [agent:ea_code][phase:comprehension] comment on Vikunja task #82 that enumerates EVERY item below — verbatim, complete, and in the exact subsections listed. Incomplete enumerations will be REJECTED.
comprehension_gate.subsection:
EA must enumerate every stale NPU identifier across PA, AO, and integration test trees. The source of record for these identifiers is `docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md` line 1567 (sprint-close remediation item) plus lines 549–550 (helper table). At minimum, enumerate:
PA: `_make_npu_stub()` helper in `services/policy_agent/tests/test_adjudicator.py` → rename to `_make_gpu_stub()` and update every call site in that file.
PA: `_make_npu_stub()` helper in `services/policy_agent/tests/test_hybrid_adjudicator.py` → rename to `_make_gpu_stub()` and update every call site in that file.
PA: class names `TestPipelineWithNPUStub` and `TestEndToEndWithNPUStub` → rename to `TestPipelineWithGPUStub` and `TestEndToEndWithGPUStub`. EA must list the exact file + line of each occurrence.
AO: `services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_gpu_inference.py` — class docstrings referencing "NPU" and the `RuntimeError("NPU fault")` mock exception message. Rename NPU → GPU in both. EA must list every docstring line and every string literal affected.
Integration: `_make_npu_allow` / `_make_npu_deny` helpers in `tests/integration/` — rename to `_make_gpu_allow` / `_make_gpu_deny`. EA must list every call site.
Integration: import aliases `NPU_PRIORITY as PA_PRIORITY` and `NPU_PRIORITY as ORCH_PRIORITY` — re-alias via `GPU_PRIORITY` after confirming (via read-only grep) that `GPU_PRIORITY` exists in the service constants modules. If it does NOT exist in production source, STOP and flag — do NOT add production code (per L-15).
Integration: Group D `TestPreemptionSignalPropagation` docstring containing the stale NPU architectural assumption.
For each enumerated item, EA states: (a) absolute file path, (b) current identifier verbatim, (c) target identifier verbatim, (d) line number(s) where it appears, (e) number of call sites that will require coordinated update. If a required identifier cannot be located, EA STOPS, does not guess, and posts the uncertainty in its comprehension comment for SDO adjudication.

The jwt_minter cross-service coupling is enumerated in `docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md` lines 1240–1253 (AO case) and lines 1407–1438 (shared case), plus sprint-close item line 1591.
AO: `services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_entrypoint.py` line 1240 region — replace `from services.policy_agent.src.jwt_minter import AgenticJWTMinter` with an import from the new shared test utility (see 3B.3).
Shared: `shared/tests/test_jwt_validator.py` lines 35–39 — replace `from services.policy_agent.src.jwt_minter import (AgenticJWTMinter, EpochManager, MintedJWT)` with imports from the new shared test utility (see 3B.3).
Create the shared test utility at **`shared/tests/_keygen.py`** (underscore-prefixed so pytest does not collect it as a test module). It must provide the minimum surface both consumers need: a `generate_key_pair()` function returning `(private_key_pem, public_key_pem)`, and either (a) a re-export of `AgenticJWTMinter`/`EpochManager`/`MintedJWT` from PA, or (b) stub equivalents that the tests can drive. Preferred: re-export from PA but keep the re-export SINGLE-LOCATION so only `_keygen.py` depends on PA. Rationale: moves the cross-service coupling to one file under shared/ instead of two.
EA must verify by `git diff main...HEAD -- shared/tests/_keygen.py` that the new file lives only under `shared/tests/`, and by `grep -rn "from services.policy_agent" services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/ shared/tests/` that the layering inversion is eliminated from consumer tests.
EA states, for each import to be reversed: file path, line numbers of the offending import, exact replacement import statement, and confirms the new `shared/tests/_keygen.py` surface exposes all symbols the consumer tests currently use. No consumer test may retain any `from services.policy_agent` import after this step.

subsection.name: 3C. File moves — 23 live-TCP tests out of unit directories

comprehension_gate.subsection:
Source: `docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md` lines 1261–1320 (ui_gateway cluster) and lines 1340–1405 (shared cluster). Sprint-close summary: line 1590.
Twelve… correction: eleven UI-gateway live-TCP tests currently in `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py` move to a NEW file `tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py` with module-level `pytestmark = pytest.mark.slow`. EA must enumerate all eleven:
TestCheckPaStatus::test_handshake_success_with_mock_server (line 338 in source)
TestLiveHandshake::test_handshake_stores_transport (line 510)
TestLiveHandshake::test_handshake_non_operational_response (line 536)
TestLiveSendPrompt::test_send_prompt_sends_ipc_message (line 566)
TestLiveStreamTokens::test_stream_tokens_full_flow (line 616)
TestLiveStreamTokens::test_stream_tokens_buffers_tool_calls (line 685)
TestLivePGOVResult::test_pgov_denied_flow (line 772)
TestLivePGOVResult::test_generation_complete_before_pgov_still_caches_result (line 819)
TestLivePGOVResult::test_blank_pgov_request_id_maps_to_active_request (line 866)
TestLiveErrorHandling::test_server_disconnect_during_stream (line 916)
TestLiveErrorHandling::test_error_message_type_ends_stream (line 951)
Twelve shared-library live-TCP tests currently in `shared/tests/test_ipc_transport.py` move to a NEW file `tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py` with module-level `pytestmark = pytest.mark.slow`. EA must enumerate all twelve:
TestVsockTransportIO::test_send_receive_roundtrip (line 323)
TestVsockTransportIO::test_send_empty_payload (line 363)
TestVsockListenerBasic::test_start_stop_lifecycle (line 422)
TestVsockListenerBasic::test_double_stop_is_safe (line 434)
TestVsockListenerAccept::test_accept_returns_transport (line 451)
TestVsockListenerAccept::test_accept_timeout_returns_none (line 481)
TestVsockListenerAccept::test_end_to_end_transport_through_listener (line 493)
TestVsockListenerAccept::test_bidirectional_through_listener (line 529)
TestVsockMTLS::test_mtls_roundtrip (line 569)
TestVsockProductionFallback::test_listener_start_no_mtls_production_fails (line 636)
TestVsockTransportPeerCN::test_peer_cn_none_in_dev_mode_accept (line 724)
TestVsockTransportPeerCN::test_peer_cn_extracted_from_mtls_cert (line 752)
The following tests remain in their current unit-test files — EA must NOT move them. They are documented borderline cases per audit, and the audit decision is to retain with justification (see TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md lines 1301–1305, 1377–1398):
ui_gateway: `TestCheckPaStatus::test_handshake_fails_with_unreachable_port` (connects to 127.0.0.1:1, OS-level connection-refused semantics, Fail-Closed retry verification) — keep in `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`.
shared: `TestVsockTransportIO::test_connect_to_nonexistent_port_returns_false`, `TestVsockTransportBasic::test_injected_socket_marks_connected`, `TestVsockTransportBasic::test_send_oversized_returns_false`, `TestVsockProductionFallback::test_transport_connect_no_mtls_production_fails` — keep in `shared/tests/test_ipc_transport.py`.

subsection.name: 3D. File moves — 19 non-cross-service tests out of integration/

comprehension_gate.subsection:
Source: `docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md` lines 1464–1498 (full table).
Nineteen tests currently in `tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py` move to service-level unit-test files. EA must enumerate each with its source line, current class::test name, and destination file:
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_create_session_returns_uuid_string (line 247) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py`
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_list_sessions_returns_created_sessions (line 256) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py`
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_add_turn_persists_turn (line 265) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py`
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_get_turns_returns_persisted_turns_in_order (line 275) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py`
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_delete_session_removes_session_and_cascades_turns (line 286) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py` (audit notes this duplicates an existing EA-3 test; EA-5 must verify duplication and REMOVE rather than relocate if the duplicate already asserts identical semantics)
TestP114GroupBSessionCRUD::test_create_session_title_truncated_to_limit (line 298) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py`
TestP114GroupATransportGatewayAPI::test_send_prompt_returns_request_id_string (line 142) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupATransportGatewayAPI::test_send_prompt_raises_when_not_operational (line 235) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupCStreamTokenFlow::test_flush_tool_call_buffer_approved_releases_tokens (line 345) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupCStreamTokenFlow::test_flush_tool_call_buffer_denied_discards_tokens (line 352) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupCStreamTokenFlow::test_tool_call_buffer_overflow_fail_closed (line 415) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py` (audit notes duplicates EA-3's `test_buffer_overflow_raises` — verify and REMOVE if identical)
TestP114GroupDBootPhase3Gating::test_gateway_reset_returns_to_initializing (line 496) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupDBootPhase3Gating::test_gateway_state_transition_to_failed_after_retries (line 489) → `services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py`
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_reason_code_labels_render_for_three_codes (line 544) → `services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py`
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_multiple_reason_codes_render_all_labels (line 559) → `services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py`
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_sanitized_text_truncated_at_200_chars (line 573) → `services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py`
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_pgov_panel_hide_clears_display (line 588) → `services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py`
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_unknown_reason_code_renders_fallback_label (line 640) → `services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py`
Module-level `test_p114_stream_token_buffer_limit_constant_present` (line 655) → REMOVE (trivially true constant check, no genuine coverage value) per audit lines 1498.
These integration tests have ambiguous cross-service status and are RETAINED in `tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py` per audit lines 1506–1522:
TestP114GroupDBootPhase3Gating::test_no_prompt_dispatched_until_operational
TestP114GroupDBootPhase3Gating::test_after_operational_prompt_dispatches_correctly
TestP114GroupDBootPhase3Gating::test_boot_log_written_on_state_transitions
TestP114GroupEPGOVDisplay::test_approved_result_does_not_trigger_pgov_panel_display

File moves must not break test collection. Before any move, EA MUST enumerate:
For the new file `tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py`: what fixtures does it need from the current `services/ui_gateway/tests/conftest.py`? Either (a) duplicate the fixtures inline, (b) add them to `tests/integration/conftest.py`, or (c) add them to the root-level `tests/conftest.py`. EA states which approach and why per governance §6.
For the new file `tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py`: what fixtures from `shared/tests/conftest.py` (if any) does it use — especially `_generate_test_certs` (lines 50–155 of `shared/tests/test_ipc_transport.py`)? If the fixture is defined inside the test file itself rather than a conftest, the move carries the fixture with it; state this explicitly.
For every destination service-level unit-test file (`test_session_store.py`, `test_transport.py`, `test_pgov_display.py`): confirm (via file read) that the file exists. If any destination file does NOT exist, STOP — do not create a new unit-test file from scratch; this is scope creep. Flag for SDO adjudication.
Enumerate every `__init__.py` that exists (or must be added) in the new directory-path chain for `tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py` and `tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py`. `tests/integration/` already carries an `__init__.py` (verify); no new `__init__.py` should be needed, but EA must confirm this is true and state the verification command used.
For each moved test: list every `import` statement in the source file that the test depends on, and state whether each is available in the destination context. Cross-service imports in a unit-test destination are forbidden (triggers an infinite-regress boundary violation) — if any moved test imports another service's internals, STOP and flag for SDO.

required_items.item: New `tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py` — module-level `pytestmark = pytest.mark.slow`. No other marker allowed at module level.

Tests moved OUT OF `tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py` into service-unit files MUST have their `slow` marker STRIPPED (unit tests are fast by definition). EA must enumerate each relocated test and confirm the `slow` marker is removed during the move.
Tests retained in `tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py` (the borderline-preserved list) keep the module-level `slow` marker unchanged.

comprehension_gate.approval_criteria: SDO reviews the comprehension comment and issues VERDICT: APPROVED only if ALL of: (a) every required_item above appears verbatim with all requested sub-information (path, line, target, call-site count); (b) no guessing language ("probably", "I think", "should be") — every assertion is backed by a file read or grep EA performed; (c) subsection 3E (infrastructure) is complete and no destination file is invented; (d) the internal execution order (rename → imports → moves) is explicitly acknowledged. Any gap → VERDICT: REJECTED with specific missing items. Three-strike comprehension cap applies per DEC-12.

work_items.work_item: Execute subsection 3A rename pass. All NPU → GPU identifier renames in a single commit on `feature/p5-task8-ea5-structural-cleanup`. Acceptance: `pytest --co -q shared/ services/ launcher/ tests/` returns zero collection errors. `grep -rn "npu\|NPU" services/policy_agent/tests/ services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/ tests/integration/` shows only justified residues (borderline cases explicitly retained per audit), which EA lists in its completion comment. Commit message: `[sprint-8:ea-5] rename: NPU → GPU nomenclature across test identifiers`

Execute subsection 3B import-layering fix. Create `shared/tests/_keygen.py` and update both consumer imports in a single commit. Acceptance: `grep -rn "from services.policy_agent" services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/ shared/tests/` returns ZERO matches. `pytest --co -q shared/ services/assistant_orchestrator/ -q` returns zero collection errors. `pytest shared/tests/test_jwt_validator.py services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_entrypoint.py -q` passes. Commit message: `[sprint-8:ea-5] imports: extract jwt key-gen to shared/tests/_keygen.py`

Execute subsection 3C file moves. Create `tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py` and `tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py`, each with module-level `pytestmark = pytest.mark.slow`. Delete the moved tests from their source files. Preserve the documented borderline cases in their source files. Acceptance: `pytest --co -q shared/ services/ launcher/ tests/` zero collection errors. `pytest --co -q -m "not slow" shared/ services/` does not collect any of the 23 moved tests. `pytest --co -q -m slow tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py` collects exactly 11 + 12 = 23 tests. Commit message: `[sprint-8:ea-5] moves: relocate 23 live-TCP tests to tests/integration/`

Execute subsection 3D file moves. Relocate 18 non-cross-service tests (19 minus the 1 REMOVED per 3D.19) to their service-unit destinations; strip `slow` marker from relocated tests (subsection 3F.3); delete duplicates (3D.5 and 3D.11 where audit confirms identical existing coverage). Acceptance: `pytest --co -q shared/ services/ launcher/ tests/` zero collection errors. `pytest --co -q tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py` collects ONLY the borderline-preserved items (exact count to be stated in EA's completion comment based on the retained list). Commit message: `[sprint-8:ea-5] moves: relocate non-cross-service tests out of tests/integration/`

Run the full REGRESSION suite and confirm no net change in pass/skip counts (Sprint 8 mandate: test logic unchanged). Acceptance: `pytest shared/ services/ launcher/ --tb=short -q` reports passed + skipped counts equal to the pre-EA-5 baseline (755 passed / 2 skipped at EA-4 merge per SDV §8.3, plus whatever EA-1..EA-4 additions landed). EA records the exact before/after counts in its completion comment. Any net loss of a test is a REJECTION condition — the only legitimate loss is the two audit-confirmed duplicates (3D.5, 3D.11) plus the single removed constant check (3D.19). No new commit unless the regression surfaces an issue requiring a fix.

Author ledger entry at `docs/ledger/20260423_235000_sprint8_ea5_structural-cleanup.md` (UTC second-resolution; EA may update the timestamp to its actual merge time). Frontmatter per Q1-1 convention:
--- ledger_id: 20260423_235000_sprint8_ea5_structural-cleanup date: 2026-04-23 sprint_id: 8 entry_type: EA predecessor: Entry 54 (Sprint 8 EA-4 — per POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md final entry) branch: feature/p5-task8-ea5-structural-cleanup merge_commit: null disposition: COMPLETE ---
Body: Summary → Deliverables (WI-1..WI-5 outcomes) → Files Changed → Quality Gate (`pytest --co` result, REGRESSION pass/skip delta). Commit message: `[sprint-8:ea-5] docs: ledger entry for structural cleanup`. EA does NOT append to `docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md` (frozen at Entry 52).

negative_constraints.constraint: DO NOT modify any file outside `tests/`, `conftest.py`, `docs/`, or `pyproject.toml`. If a production code change is required to unblock a test, STOP, document the blocker in your completion report, and wait for SDO direction. Do not make the change unilaterally.
DO NOT address ISS-3 (PA stop-token fix). Deferred to a future sprint.
DO NOT add USE-CASE-002 / 003 / 005 feature code.
DO NOT run EAs in parallel. EA-5 is strictly sequential after EA-4 merge.

`git diff main...branch --name-only` must show ONLY test files, ledger file under `docs/ledger/`, optionally `docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md` (only if the audit itself is updated to reflect actioned items), and `pyproject.toml` (ONLY if marker registration requires it — unlikely). Any other file present is an out-of-scope change and a REJECTION condition.

Adjacent scope items discovered during execution are capped at ≤ 1 hour of additional work each. Items exceeding the cap MUST be flagged in EA-5's completion comment as new Vikunja tasks for Co-Lead adjudication, NOT absorbed silently.

DO NOT introduce new test scenarios in WI-3 and WI-4. File moves are verbatim relocations — the test body must be byte-identical (modulo import-path adjustments) after the move. Adding or "improving" an assertion during a move is out-of-scope.
DO NOT modify `docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md` (frozen per Q1-1). Ledger goes to `docs/ledger/` per WI-6.

oracle.exit_check: `pytest --co -q shared/ services/ launcher/ tests/` returns exit code 0 with zero collection errors. This is the single load-bearing gate for EA-5 per SDV §5.1 item 5 and continuation §EA-5 ORACLE.

`git diff main...feature/p5-task8-ea5-structural-cleanup --name-only` shows ONLY files matching the allowlist in N-5. Enumerate the expected set:
- services/policy_agent/tests/test_adjudicator.py (rename) - services/policy_agent/tests/test_hybrid_adjudicator.py (rename) - services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_gpu_inference.py (rename) - tests/integration/test_*.py (renames + moves) - services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py (moves out + 3D moves in) - services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py (3D moves in) - services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py (3D moves in) - services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_entrypoint.py (3B import) - shared/tests/test_ipc_transport.py (3C moves out) - shared/tests/test_jwt_validator.py (3B import) - shared/tests/_keygen.py (new, 3B.3) - tests/integration/test_ui_gateway_ipc.py (new, 3C.1..3C.11) - tests/integration/test_shared_ipc_transport.py (new, 3C.12..3C.23) - tests/integration/test_p114_ui_end_to_end.py (3D moves out, 3D.19 delete) - docs/ledger/20260423_*_sprint8_ea5_structural-cleanup.md (new)
Any file outside this set appearing in the diff is a REJECTION condition.

REGRESSION pass/skip delta (WI-5) shows: net -3 tests (two audit- confirmed duplicates 3D.5 and 3D.11, plus removed constant check 3D.19) relative to EA-4 merge baseline. No other test may disappear or skip.

The new `shared/tests/_keygen.py` exposes exactly the symbols needed by its two consumers (AO test_entrypoint and shared test_jwt_validator) — no extra public surface. `grep -n "^def \|^class " shared/tests/_keygen.py` output must be minimal and each consumer's import line must map to a symbol present in that output.

ea_prompt.completion_contract:
When all WIs complete and all oracle checks pass, EA posts `[agent:ea_code][phase:completion]` on Vikunja task #82 with:
Commit list — one line per commit (WI-1 through WI-6), each with short hash and message.
Diff summary — output of `git diff main...HEAD --stat` restricted to the allowlisted paths.
Acceptance results — one line per oracle check O-1..O-4 with PASS/FAIL and supporting evidence (command output excerpts).
Regression delta — exact pass/skip counts before and after, noting the -3 expected delta.
Residual NPU references — output of the NPU/npu grep across test trees, with each residue explicitly justified as borderline- preserved or escalated for SDO review if unexpected.
Scope exceptions — any adjacent-scope items discovered, whether absorbed under the ≤1h cap or flagged for new tickets.
Ledger entry path — absolute repo-relative path of the new ledger file per WI-6.
Then apply `Gate:Pending-SDO` (id 9) on task #82 for SDO completion review.

lesson.application: Comprehension gate §3 requires verbatim enumeration; oracle §6 specifies exact git diff expectation; completion contract §7 specifies exact section structure.
parent_head recorded in §2 via current SDO-verified HEAD; EA re-verifies at branch checkout time.
§3 enumeration gate is the harder-than-standard comprehension gate this lesson mandates.
N-1 carries the exact mandated negative-constraint wording verbatim.
